title: Modulo Yuji & Blood Moon sword
description: This mod brings the modulo yuji from jjk:modulo as a boss and adds a unique sword called blood moon sword that gives you magical abilities.
body:
To get started and fight the boss you will firstly need to craft a item called Eye of Doom.
![eye of doom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/097298f6fced207816b2a1d905ba4312820d16e3.png)
after you craft this item,you can right click to start the fight and summon the boss.if you manage to kill him,he will drop a unique sword called blood moon sword:
![blood moon sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37682344b166ee7ade0d622a96baaf3bbbb624a9_0.webp)
TO USE THE WEAPONS ABILITIES,RIGHT CLICK WITH THE WEAPON IN YOUR MAIN HAND.
this weapon currenty has 3 active abilities.
first ability:Piercing blood
second ability:wing king parry
third ability:Grab
![abilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/296c87b2444aebfcd3dad1f51f0a70541b4c1c12.png)
PIERCING BLOOD: shoot a stream of blood for 3 seconds dealing heavy damage and applying potion effect(nausea.posion) to anyone whos is caught in the line
range:51 blocks 1x1
cooldown:10 seconds
![piercing blood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fc6513613ff3e69319f888c213b89971461ebd1_0.webp)
PARRY: do a quick parry and deflect the first incoming attack in a 0.35 second range after uisng the ability.
cooldown:0 if you succed with the parry,2 seconds if you miss the parry.
![parry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f13b65b4dba3df936be2dc7cd88e280bf08cf5d4_0.webp)
GRAB: grab a target that is close to your look angle,bring them to yourself.stun for 2 seconds,and lifesteal 20% of their current hp.after 2 seconds,launch them to your look position.
![grab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/921fd421746273789d844ef0b67e89022ffd4504.png)
tips for fighting the boss.
1 if you try to cheese the boss,he will tp to you and deal heavy damage.so,dont try to cheese it.
2 if you play too close to the boss,he will do a dropkick dealing heavy damage
3 if you stay close too him for too him he will use Blood Rain,dealing heavy damage and slowing you.
4 the boss moveset is all about comboing you.so, try to break the flow of the boss and keep a 5-10 block distance.be carefull though,he might sometimes slide to you if you play too good.
5 sometimes,the boss will launch you far away.if you see a soul fire form around him. run he is gonna use Divine Flames which is his strongest attack.

divine flames
![divine flames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b97a3dfb3b15f3878dbc9b7fb1a2c778ccab77a7.png)
blood rain+dismantle
![blood rain and dismantle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfddef22e90a71eb094c3742f8f8d0892514884.png)
side notes;

i suggest you fight the boss in a flat area so you can dogde his attacks.

although this boss is still beatable with vanilla items.this boss is intented to be fought with cursed techniques from the mod Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate

join my discord[discord](https://discord.gg/DTYQKmq6bW)
